---
title: "RadIUS dashboard (try-out)"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    vertical_layout: scroll
    source_code: embed 
    theme: 
      version: 4
    runtime: shiny
---

```{r libraries, include=FALSE}
# dashboard packages
library(flexdashboard)
library(shiny)
```

Home
=====================================



Verspreiding
=====================================

Inputs {.sidebar}
-------------------------------------
```{r inputs-verspreiding}

```

Row
-------------------------------------
```{r}

```


Bezetting per soort
=====================================

Inputs {.sidebar}
-------------------------------------
```{r input-bezetting-per-soort}

```

Row
-------------------------------------
```{r}

```


Bezetting per gebied
=====================================

Inputs {.sidebar}
-------------------------------------
```{r input-bezetting-per-gebied}

```

Row
-------------------------------------
```{r}

```
